title: Forgetful Sniffer
description: Sniffers can now repeatedly dig up seeds in the same block
body:
## Description
Usually sniffers remember places they have already searched. But the mod/datapack makes it so that sniffers don’t remember anything and can re-dig the same block several times

What will allow you to make flower farms like this:

![Farm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d82db51058b427893406346410b2ff4cb73b40b6.gif)

## Dependencies
- Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
